UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AND RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO FIRST AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION - SAC SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES MISREPRESENTATION IN REGARDS TO 12-MONTH LOAN REINSTATEMENT OFFERED ON MARCH 23, 2012 (SAC 6:5-10); FALSITY OF AVAILABILITY OF SUCH REINSTATEMENT (SAC 6:20; 6:28); INTENT, RELIANCE AND DAMAGES (SAC 6: 10; AND PARAGRAPH 26). DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO (1) SECOND AND SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION AND NEGLIGENCE TO ALLEGE LEGAL DUTY; AND (2) THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE TO ALLEGE UNCONDITIONAL TENDER AND FACTS SHOWING THAT AMOUNT REQUESTED IN NOD AND NOTS WERE "IMPROPERLY INFLATED." PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Continued To Jul-31-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to first and fourth causes of action - SAC sufficiently alleges misrepresentation in regards to 12-month loan reinstatement offered on March 23, 2012 (SAC 6:5-10); falsity of availability of such reinstatement (SAC 6:20; 6:28); intent, reliance and damages (SAC 6: 10; and paragraph 26). Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to (1) second and sixth causes of action for negligent misrepresentation and negligence to allege legal duty; and (2) third cause of action for wrongful foreclosure to allege unconditional tender and facts showing that amount requested in NOD and NOTS were "improperly inflated." Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Jasmine Horton of Reed Smith LLP (213-457-8186) appearing for defendant Bank of American moving party via CourtCall. No other appearance.

The tentative ruling is adopted, DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AND RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for Intentional Misrepresentation, Negligent Mispresentation, Negligence, Wrongful Foreclosure, UCL; Overruled - Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress; Sustain without leave to amend as to Breach of Contract. Prevaling party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
